candidate_summary: Harmonic-partial-anchored multi-criteria LLM judge for Mongolian/Tuvan khoomei throat singing. Extracts gist embedding e_F (fundamental) + K harmonic-partial-aspect projections {e_F + h_k · δ_k} for K rubric dimensions. Computes per-partial deviation_k vs ideal_partial. PASS only if ALL K partials deviate < τ_clean AND ||e_F - e_F_ref|| < τ_F. Provides defect localization per-partial.

results.title: RULERS Locked Rubrics Evidence-Anchored
results.rationale: Shares conjunctive per-dimension Pass/Fail gating and rubric-anchored judging. Functional overlap on the all-K-pass gating mechanism is high; domain (khoomei/audio partials) differs but the judge architecture aligns.

results.title: Recursive Rubric Decomposition
keyword_overlap_terms: per-partial deviation rubric defect localization (fine-grained criteria)
results.rationale: Decomposes into fine-grained criteria similar to per-partial rubric dimensions, but lacks the embedding-projection + reference-distance gating; no kw>=2, sem<0.7, func<0.7.

results.title: LLM-Rubric Multidimensional Calibrated
keyword_overlap_terms: harmonic-partial anchored multi-criteria LLM judge (multidimensional judge)
results.rationale: Multidimensional calibrated rubric evaluator overlaps on multi-criteria judging, but lacks partial-projection embeddings, reference-anchor gating, and defect localization. Below all thresholds.

results.title: PEARL Multi-Metric Rubric Framework
results.rationale: Integrates multiple rubric metrics but no embedding-projection-per-aspect, no fundamental-reference gating, no conjunctive ALL-pass logic explicitly. Below all thresholds.

results.title: Task-Adaptive Rubrics
keyword_overlap_terms: per-partial deviation rubric defect localization (task-adaptive rubric criteria)
results.rationale: Task-adaptive rubric generation is orthogonal to fixed-K harmonic-partial rubric with reference embedding. No projection mechanism. Below thresholds.

results.title: Multi-Criterion Validity LLM-Judge
results.rationale: Concerns construct validity of multi-criterion judges; does not propose embedding-aspect projections nor per-partial gating. Below thresholds.

results.title: Anchor Papers in Automated Essay Scoring
results.rationale: Anchor-based calibration is conceptually similar to e_F_ref reference, but no per-aspect harmonic projections nor conjunctive gating. Below thresholds.

results.title: Multi-Agent LLM Judge Personalization
keyword_overlap_terms: harmonic-partial anchored multi-criteria LLM judge (multi-agent judge)
results.rationale: Closed-loop sample-selection/eval/rewrite agents differ from static per-partial deviation gating. Below thresholds.

decision_rationale: RULERS (2601.08654) triggers a hit via keyword overlap (>=2) and functional_score 0.74 (>=0.7): it implements rubric-anchored, per-dimension Pass/Fail with conjunctive gating, which functionally mirrors the candidate's ALL-K-partial-pass gating and anchored judging mechanism. The harmonic-partial embedding-projection + fundamental-reference distance gating is partially mapped but the core conjunctive multi-criteria judge structure is prior art. Therefore the candidate fails novelty under the verifier rule.
